case_title: NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC VS. LINH N NGO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC SERVED OCT-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N
NOT FOUND OR NO SERVICE RETURN ATTEMPTING TO SERVE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT ON SEPT-09-12. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $345.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 15126146) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N $1,025.04 PRINCIPAL, $345.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,370.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $261.06 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 15069102) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013
DECLARATION WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, LINH N
